query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 live official Wyoming Department of Education special-education and IDEA pages after confirming the host family is publicly reviewable again.

samples.evidence_snippet: The live official WDE special education hub is publicly reviewable again and preserves parent-facing statewide special-education navigation on the WDE host.

The official IDEA page says Wyoming must submit an annual application to the U.S. Department of Education Office of Special Education Programs to receive federal funds for services to children with disabilities ages 3 through 21 across the state.
The reviewed IDEA page links the current Annual State Application PDF on the official WDE host, preserving a current statewide Part B artifact.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live official HCBS contact page plus the linked county-assignment PDF for DD and CCW Benefits and Eligibility Specialists.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official HCBS contact page names the HCBS Section Administrator and links `Benefits and Eligibility Specialists` under `Click below for HCBS Specialists by County`.

samples.sample_name: HCBS BES county assignments PDF overview
samples.evidence_snippet: The PDF title is `HCBS Benefits and Eligibility Specialists (BES) Assistance & Eligibility County Assignments` and it explicitly lists counties served for DD across all 23 Wyoming counties.
The DD county assignments PDF lists `Crook, Johnson, Lincoln, Niobrara, Uinta` as counties served for DD under one Benefits and Eligibility Specialist assignment.
The same official PDF separately assigns `Carbon, Laramie (A-L), Weston` as counties served for DD.
The official county-assignment PDF also lists `Big Horn, Platte, Sublette, Sweetwater, Washakie` as counties served for DD.
The same official PDF separately assigns `Campbell, Converse, Goshen` and then `Natrona` in the DD county coverage table.
The official DD county assignments also cover `Fremont, Hot Springs` and `Albany, Sheridan, Teton` as separate county groups.
The final DD county group on the official PDF assigns `Laramie (M-Z), Park`, completing explicit county coverage for all 23 Wyoming counties.
The current Supports Waiver application guide instructs applicants to contact the Division Benefits and Eligibility Specialist and confirms the DD waiver application process on the official WDH host.
